name: Basic Plan
description: Ideal for individuals who want to stay fit with essential gym access.
features: Access to gym facilities during regular hours
Discount on additional personal training sessions

name: Premium Plan
description: Perfect for dedicated fitness enthusiasts seeking expanded access and premium amenities.
features: 4 Free personal training sessions per month
Priority booking for classes and trainers
Access to sauna and steam room

name: Elite Plan
description: Ultimate membership for serious athletes with full access to all facilities and VIP perks.
